title: The Master Planner Saga
description: Spider-Man battles the Master Planner (Doctor Octopus in disguise) while Aunt May's life hangs in the balance. Culminates in the legendary ASM #33.

title: The Goblin's Identity Revealed
description: The Green Goblin discovers Spider-Man's secret identity and Peter learns who the Goblin truly is.

title: Goblin Reborn
description: Stan Lee tackled drug addiction without Comics Code Authority approval. Harry Osborn overdoses on pills.

title: The Six-Armed Saga
description: Spider-Man takes a serum to remove his powers but grows four extra arms. Leads to the introduction of Morbius.

title: The Kingpin Tablet Saga
description: The Kingpin steals a mysterious ancient tablet and Spider-Man must retrieve it across multiple battles.

title: The Nullifier Saga
description: Doctor Octopus steals the Nullifier device and uses it to cause Spider-Man to lose his memory.

title: The Night Gwen Stacy Died
description: One of the most pivotal moments in Spider-Man history. The Green Goblin kills Gwen Stacy. Norman Osborn then dies.

title: Harry Osborn as the Green Goblin
description: Harry Osborn discovers Peter is Spider-Man and becomes the second Green Goblin.

title: The Original Clone Saga
description: The Jackal clones Spider-Man and both the clone and the original must face off. Leads to the first appearance of the Spider-Clone (Ben Reilly) and return of Gwen Stacy ?!?.

title: Spider-Man No More
description: The Kingpin's debut and rise to power as New York's greatest crime lord beginning with Spider-Man No More.

title: The Death of Captain Stacy
description: The tragic death of Captain Stacy and its impact on the Spider-Man universe.
